channel.title: Warren Woodhouse

item.title: List of films and tv series similar to the video game franchise Horizon: Zero Dawn (Horizon: Zero Dawn) (Lists) (Gaming)
item.description:
List by Warren Woodhouse

Here are some films and tv series that I’ve seen that remind me of the video game franchise Horizon: Zero Dawn.

If you have any suggestions, please CLICK HERE.

Films

  • Singularity (2017)
  • Prey (2022)
  • Oblivion (2013)
  • The Creator (2023)

TV Series
  • Farscape
  • Attack on Titan

item.title: What Font is used for the Subnautica franchise logo? (What Fonts) (Subnautica)
item.description:
The font used for the franchise logo is called Days One by Jovanny Lemonad.

CLICK HERE to try out the font. Available for use on Blogger, CLICK HERE to see the CSS Code.
item.author: noreply@blogger.com (WarrenWoodhouse)

item.title: What Font is used for the Alan Wake logo? (What Fonts) (Alan Wake)
item.description:
The font that’s used for the franchise logo is called Compacta Standard Light Compressed by ITC.

CLICK HERE to try out the font.


The font that’s used for the typewritten pages in the game is called Secret Service Typewriter by Red Rooster.

CLICK HERE to try out the font.

item.author: noreply@blogger.com (WarrenWoodhouse)

item.title: Are the Assassins or the Templars correct? (Assassin’s Creed Alpha) (Assassin’s Creed) (Gaming)
item.description:
Article by Warren Woodhouse


Neither the Assassins nor Templars are correct, I’ll explain but be prepared for a TL;DR. Sorry for the spoilers.

The Assassin’s Brotherhood and the Knights Templars have been at a very long and dragged out war against each other for eons, with neither side giving up.

Let’s say if you get to the end of the story of AC Valhalla, you’ll come across the glowy people cutscene, these two people are important as they’ve saved the world in a way, past and present. Desmond sacrifices himself in AC3 and Layla sacrifices herself in AC Valhalla, Layla has become the Mother of Wisdom and Desmond has became the Father of Understanding. If you’ve read the cave paintings in AC Rogue, the Mother of Wisdom is also possibly the Sky Woman in those cave paintings. Here’s another one I’ve noticed when playing on AC Liberation a few years ago, realised that Eurdito is Latin and it means Truth, as in literal truth. The Animus machine is also a time machine to some capacity, but how?

Both parties are right and wrong in their methods and teachings, neither fully understand the truth other than one person entirely: Ezio Auditore de Firenze, in AC Revelations he spoke across thousands of years to leave a message behind for Desmond in the future. Is it possible that Ezio is a conduit in all of this?! Is it possible that Desmond could finally find the answer to stopping the world from being obliterated? Who knows… with Ubisoft, it could all be for nothing and yet they leave these stories behind to intrigue those like me and you, especially those who have had the patience to read this far.

Some of the historical events have been slightly altered.

Interestingly, Otso Berg mentioned in AC Rogue that he went in the Animus once and found out that one of his ancestors was a Viking raider and part of a raiding party who raided Lindisfarne Priory in the 9th Century, funnily enough is when AC Valhalla takes place, yet we receive no DLCs nor any references in the game relating to or regarding Otso’s story. Developer oversight during AC Valhalla, perhaps?

Anyways, thanks for reading guys and gals.
item.author: noreply@blogger.com (WarrenWoodhouse)

item.category: Saints Row: The Third: The Full Package
item.title: Cheats - Saints Row: The Third Guide
item.description:
Guide by Warren Woodhouse


As a warning before you go all cheat crazy, using cheats in Saints Row: The Third will stop you from being able to unlock trophies/achievements in that save file. Make sure you save before applying any cheat code and you can always go back to where you were before cheating.


To use cheats, simply open up your in-game mobile phone. Once you’re on your phone, open up the Extras menu and then select Cheats. You’ll need to manually type in the cheats. The full list of cheat codes are available below.



Gameplay

  • cheese - $100,000 cash
  • dlc_car_mass - Adds a load of weight to your vehicle so it pushes away all others
  • dlc_never_die - You can’t be killed
  • dlc_player_pratfalls - You’ll pratfall
  • dlc_unlimited_ammo - Infinite ammo
  • dlc_unlimited_clip - Ammo clip lasts forever
  • fryhole - Heaven Bound (bodies float upwards towards Heaven)
  • goldengun - One-shot kills
  • goodygoody - Completely removes Police Notoriety
  • isquishyou - You will smash up other vehicles with your own
  • lolz - Increases Gang Notoriety
  • notrated - Exploding bodies
  • oops - Completely removes Gang Notoriety
  • pissofpigs - Increases Police Notoriety
  • runfast - No sprinting resctrictions
  • vroom - Your vehicle takes no damage
  • whatitmeanstome - Gives 100,000 Respect



Weather

  • Clearskies - Makes it sunny
  • heavyrain - Heavy rain
  • lightrain - Makes it rain
  • overcast - Makes it cloudy
  • ticktock - Changes the time of day



World

  • brains - All pedestrians become zombies
  • dlc_low_gravity - Lowers the gravity
  • dlc_super_explosions - Makes all explosions four times larger
  • dlc_super_saints - Makes the Saints super
  • dui - All pedestrians become drunk
  • hohoho - All pedestrians become pimps and prostitutes
  • mascot - All pedestrians become mascots
  • nohud - Removes the HUD
  • turkeyburgers - Activates God Mode and you become unstoppable



Weapons

  • giveairstrike – SA-3 Air Strike
  • giveapoca – Apocafists
  • givear55 – AR-55
  • givebaseball – Baseball Bat
  • giveblossom – D4TH Blossom
  • givechainsaw - Chainsaw
  • givecyber – Cyber Buster
  • givecybersmg – Cyber Blaster
  • givedigger – Grave Digger
  • givedildo – The Penetrator
  • givedrone – Reaper Drone
  • giveelectric – Electric Grenades
  • giveflamethrower – Incinerator
  • givegrenade - Grenades
  • givehammer - Hammer
  • givekobra – KA-1 Kobra
  • givekrukov - K-8 Krukov
  • givelauncher – GL G20
  • giveminigun – Mini-Gun
  • givemolotov – Molotov Cocktails
  • givercgun – RC Possessor
  • giverocket – Shock Hammer
  • giverpg – RPG Launcher
  • givesatchel – Satchel Charges
  • givesheperd – 45 Shepherd
  • giveshield – Riot Shield
  • giveslm8 – Viper Laser Rifle
  • givesniper – McManus 2015
  • givesonic – Sonic Boom
  • givestungun – Stun Gun
  • givesword – Nocturne
  • givetek - Tek Z-10
  • giveultimax – AS3 Ultimax
  • letsrock - All Weapons



Vehicles

  • giveanchor - Anchor
  • giveattrazione - Attrazione
  • givebootlegger - Bootlegger
  • givechallenger - Challenger
  • givecommander - Commander
  • givecondor - Condor
  • giveeagle - Eagle
  • giveembulance - Ambulance
  • giveestrada - Estrada
  • givegatmobile - Gatmobile
  • givekanada - Kanada
  • givekenshin - Kenshin
  • giveknoxville - Knoxville
  • givekobra - Korbra
  • givekrukov - Krukov
  • givemiami - Miami
  • givemunicipal - Municipal
  • givenforcer - Nforcer
  • givepeacemaker - Peacemaker
  • givephoenix - Phoenix
  • givequasar - Quasar
  • givereaper - Reaper
  • giverpg - RPG
  • givesandstorm - Sandstorm
  • givesatchel - Satchel Charge
  • giveshark - Shark
  • givesheperd - Sheperd
  • givespectre - Spectre
  • givestatusquo - Status Quo
  • givetaxi - Taxi
  • givetitan - Titan
  • givetoad - Toad
  • givetornado - Tornado
  • givevortex - Vortex
  • givevtol - VTOL
  • givevulture - Vulture
  • givewidowmaker - Widowmaker
  • givewoodpecker - Woodpecker
  • repaircar - Repairs your vehicle
item.author: noreply@blogger.com (WarrenWoodhouse)

item.title: How to resolve the PS5’s WiFi Connection Issue (How Tos) (Tutorials) (Codes) (Gaming)
item.description:
Solution by Warren Woodhouse

  1. Install PS5 Updates
  2. Turn off the PS5 completely
  3. Turn off and unplug interfering devices like Ring door bell cameras and anything similar, such as smart speakers
  4. Turn off the router at the wall for 30-60 seconds
  5. Wait for 60 seconds then on the PS5, press and hold the power button until you hear the second beep, this lets you enter Safe Mode
  6. In Safe Mode, select Clear System Software Cache and Rebuild Database and then select Clear System Software Cache
  7. Once you reach the Home Screen of the PS5, turn off the PS5
  8. Enter Safe Mode again, this time you need to Rebuild Database, this defrags the console. Defragging brings the most recent files to the front, making the console or a computer run faster
  9. On the Home Screen, head to Settings in the top right of the screen (cog wheel) and select Network
  10. In Network, head to Settings then into Set Up Internet Connection
  11. You should find your Network name here, press the Options button on the PS5 controller and select Advanced Settings
  12. Set the following: IP Address Settings as Automatic; DHCP Host as Don’t Specify; DNS Settings as Manual with Primary DNS as 1.1.1.1 and Secondary DNS as 1.0.0.1; Proxy Server as Don’t Use; MTU Settings as Manual with MTU as 1492
  13. Select OK
  14. Wait for the connection to establish
  15. Head back to the main section of the Network page and select Connection Status
  16. Then select View Connection Status
  17. Your WiFi signal strength should now be either 68% or 70% instead of 42% or 50%
  18. You can improve this connection by using either a wired Ethernet connection directly to the console and the router; by moving the console and router closer to each other; by placing the router at a higher elevation rather than on the floor or on a coffee table (ceilings give a better result if the console is in a room above the router position); changing the GHz band from 2.4 to 5 has been proven to work in some cases but not all; waiting for Sony to release a firmware update patch, these are all examples of ways to improve your connection. Alternatively, you can also use Google’s secure public DNS servers instead of Cloudflare’s. The following are: Google Public DNS: primary is 8.8.8.8 and secondary is 8.8.4.4; Cloudflare Public DNS: primary is 1.1.1.1 and secondary is 1.0.0.1
  19. If the issue persists, contact PlayStation Support
  20. Make sure you restart your router at the start of every month to ensure the best experience with your Internet connection
item.author: noreply@blogger.com (WarrenWoodhouse)

item.title: Platinum Trophy Guides
item.description:
Guides by Warren Woodhouse

The links below go to my platinum trophy guide playlists on my YouTube Gaming channel. CLICK HERE to visit my YouTube Gaming channel for more content. If there is no video playlist, the link below will link to my guide on my blog.

item.title: List of films similar to the video game Prey (Lists) (Gaming)
item.description:
List by Warren Woodhouse

Here are some films I’ve seen that have similar themes to the game Prey, a sci-fi thriller.

  • Moon (2009)
  • Alien (1979)
  • The Thing (1982)
  • Life (2017)
  • Event Horizon (1997)
  • Sunshine (2007)
  • Pitch Black (2000)
  • Starship Troopers (1997)
Do you know of anymore that I might have overlooked? CLICK HERE to make a suggestion.

item.title: Actual Canon Endings in Video Games (Lists) (Gaming)
item.description:
List by Warren Woodhouse

This list only includes all of the actual canon endings in various video games. To contribute to this list, CLICK HERE.

  • Beyond: Two Souls: Epilogue > Zoey
  • Spider-Man: Web of Shadows: The Hero Ending
  • GTA IV: Roman & Malorie Alive
  • GTA V: The Third Way
  • Saints Row: The Third: Shaundi Lives
  • WATCH_DOGS: Log Off (Kill Maurice at the End of the Game)
  • Saints Row IV: Zinyak Dead
  • The Stanley Parable (Original Half-Life 2 Mod Release): Freedom Ending
  • The Stanley Parable (2013): Freedom Ending
  • The Stanley Parable: Ultra Deluxe: Freedom Ending
  • This War of Mine: Epilogue (Everyone Survived)
  • Life is Strange: Chapter 5: Polarized > Sacrifice Chloe
  • Life is Strange 2: Chapter 5: Wolves > Daniel and Sean made it to Mexico alive
  • Life is Strange: True Colors: Jed and Diane go to prison
  • Life is Strange: Double Exposure: Yasmin is exposed for her crimes
  • Life is Strange: Reunion: Best Ending/Golden Ending
  • Fallout: add ending here
  • Fallout 2: add ending here
  • Fallout Tactics: Brotherhood of Steel: add ending here
  • Fallout 3: add ending here
  • Fallout: New Vegas: Yes Man Ending
  • Fallout 4: add ending here
  • Fallout 76: add ending here
  • This Bed We Made: Best Ending: no developer-confirmed canon ending however the best outcome is for Sophie to end up dating Beth or Andrew and the real killer (Samuel Williams) ends up in prison
  • Mass Effect: Renegade-leaning Paragon results
  • Mass Effect 2: Everyone in the Normandy Crew Survived the Suicide Mission
  • Mass Effect 3: Perfect Destroy Ending
  • Mass Effect: Andromeda: no official confirmed canon ending
  • Mass Effect 4: add ending here
  • inFAMOUS: add
  • inFAMOUS 2: add
  • inFAMOUS: Second Son: add
  • inFAMOUS: First Light: add
item.author: noreply@blogger.com (WarrenWoodhouse)

item.title: Suspects - Life is Strange: Double Exposure Guide
item.description:
Photo and Note by Warren Woodhouse

This is a note containing information on who I think is the suspect in the game of Life is Strange: Double Exposure. From what I understand and remember fully, I believe that everyone is be blamed as they all had motives which lead to them being described as a suspect. The only one who is not a suspect is Maya Okada.
item.author: noreply@blogger.com (WarrenWoodhouse)
